title: Smoky Pozole Rigatoni Bowl
description: A twist on traditional rigatoni, this smoky pozole bowl combines the comforting flavors of Mexico with a hearty pasta-based meal.

ingredients.name: roasted tangy vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, bell peppers, and zucchini

instructions: Cook the rigatoni in a large pot of boiling salted water until al dente.
While the rigatoni cooks, heat the smoky pozole sauce in a large skillet over medium-low heat.
Add the roasted tangy vegetables to the skillet and stir to combine.
Drain the cooked rigatoni and add it to the skillet with the pozole sauce and vegetables.
Stir to combine and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the rigatoni mixture hot, topped with chopped cilantro and lime wedges.
